posts.author: AAcosta3810 (Acosta)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Be able to select multiple items/subitems at once when viewing from battery or graph widget in a Dashboard

What are you trying to achieve

Currently if you want to update any statuses when viewing past due items from a widget (Battery or graph) you can only update the items/subitems one by one. There is not an option to select and update multiples items/subitems like you can from the board view.
